---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point are you addressing?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already considered?

## Additional Context
Mockups, links, or any other context that helps explain the request.
